Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts Continued Deposition And Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Coblentz, Patch, Duffy & Bass LLP's Motion To Compel Defendant's Continued Deposition And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be noticed by Plaintiff and to be completed no later than January 9, 2008. Defendant's failure to appear for the resumption of his deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,000, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
